description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish Brew Packages that can be triggered manually with a channel and run ID, or called by another workflow with the same inputs. The workflow runs on macOS 15, checks if the provided channel is supported (only 'nightly' is allowed), checks out the repository, downloads Homebrew Bottle XCFramework artifacts from a specified run, and publishes them to an S3 bucket under the given channel.
